title: BEM-849 watch 848
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-23 | 13:56 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b848=load('governance/state/bem848_reconcile_runner_smoke_and_triad.json')
if b848:
    status='bem848_state_found'
    next_action=b848.get('next_action','continue from BEM-848')
    missing=b848.get('missing',[])
else:
    status='bem848_state_missing_after_queue'
    next_action='rerun reconcile smoke/triad with new trace or inspect runner queue if BEM-848 remains stuck'
    missing=['bem848_state']
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':status,'bem848_status':b848.get('status'),'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_watch_bem848_or_requeue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_watch_bem848_or_requeue.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Watch BEM-848 Or Requeue | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem849_watch_bem848_or_requeue.json','governance/reports/bem849_watch_bem848_or_requeue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Watched for BEM-848 repo state and routed either to BEM-848 next action or to stuck-runner requeue diagnosis')
"""
